5.2
Ablation Study
We perform an ablation study based on the BART-
Large model to evaluate the contribution of key
components in our approach under three settings:
(1) without the IDNA module (w/o IDNA), (2) with-
out contrastive learning in the encoder (w/o RSM),
and (3) without contrastive learnin

human evaluations.
